parameters.name: optionIds
parameters.description: Selected option ids. Can be repeated (?optionIds=1&optionIds=2) or comma-separated (?optionIds=1,2)

parentId.description: Parent category id (0 means no parent)
Parent category id (0 means no parent)

priceDelta.description: Price delta added to base product price

name.description: Variant group title, for example Size or Material

isRequired.description: Whether one option from this group must be selected
